response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack software craftsman focused on web, mobile, and application development with TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. The role requires deep hardware expertise in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator architecture, deep-learning workload optimization, and hardware-software co-design — none of which appear in the resume. Brief C/C++ work at National Instruments on a measurement IDE does not approach the principal-level hardware architecture experience required.
strengths: Strong software engineering breadth across many languages and stacks
Some low-level C/C++ experience at National Instruments
Demonstrated craftsmanship via TDD, workshops, and open-source contributions
concerns: No SoC, IP modeling, or hardware architecture experience
No AI accelerator, GPU, SIMD/MIMD, or deep-learning workload optimization background
Lacks required advanced degree or equivalent hardware-focused principal-level experience

key_factors.factor: No AI accelerator or DNN optimization background
